demand_grid.detailed_description: Participants see a sequence of boxes lighting up on a grid. They must identify the correct pattern from two options (original vs. modified). On each trial, a sequence of steps is shown, where each step lights up a set of adjacent boxes. After the sequence, two grids are displayed side by side: one showing the original pattern and one with a modified step. The participant presses left or right to indicate which grid matches the original sequence.

responses.description: Response keys for left and right choices.

num_steps.description: Number of steps in the sequence shown to the participant.

num_boxes_lit.description: Number of boxes lit up per step.

trial_dur.description: Duration of each trial in seconds.

question_dur.description: Duration of the question phase where the two options are shown.

sequence_dur.description: Duration of the sequence presentation phase.
